title: Trump criticizes hush money judge
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan cleared his courtroom to chastise a key defense witness for Donald Trump after he made an exasperated comment about the judge's rulings.

title: Biden administration proposes end to coal leases in Powder River Basin
shortDescription: One of Wyoming's top coal producing sites, the Powder River Basin, will no longer be leased after 2041, causing outrage among GOP lawmakers

title: Kentucky's primary election is Tuesday. Here's what you should know.
shortDescription: Kentucky voters head to the polls on Tuesday to vote in the presidential, U.S. House and state legislative primaries.

title: The Obamas outperform celebrity peers in election influence
shortDescription: In a new poll from USA TODAY and Suffolk University, it turns out the traditional "celebrity endorsement" may not help politicians this year.

title: Why was there a DRC flag behind Biden during his Morehouse speech?
shortDescription: An alleged coup in the DRC was taking place while Biden delivered his commencement address at Morehouse College.

title: Four states will have abortion on the ballot, others on the way
shortDescription: A total of 10 states either have abortion on the ballot or have initiatives to place it in front of voters in progress.

title: Executive privilege explainer: Why Biden invoked the presidential power
shortDescription: What exactly is executive privilege, and how does it allow Biden to restrict access to a deposition with Robert Hur about classified documents?

title: Biden campaign says Trump froze. Trump said his pause was intentional.
shortDescription: Biden supporters were quick to attack Trump after he paused for more than 30 seconds during a speech to NRA members Saturday.

title: Why advocates, voters with disabilities are fighting Ohio election law
shortDescription: Does Ohio law violate the rights of voters with disabilities? A federal court could decide ahead of the November election.

title: Michael Cohen testified on these key pieces of evidence in Trump trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's criminal hush money trial has concluded its fifth week. Here is some key evidence that jurors saw under key witness Michael Cohen.

title: Biden speech at Morehouse gets mixed reviews
shortDescription: Some graduates turned their backs and protesters gathered near the campus in opposition to Joe Biden's handling of the Israel-Hamas war.

title: Biden calls Trump 'unhinged,' 'screwy' during Detroit event
shortDescription: President Biden, in his first visit to Detroit to campaign for reelection, calls Trump "unhinged."

title: Trump trial recap: Judge clears courtroom in fiery exchange with witness
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan clashed with Trump defense witness Robert Costello: 'Are you staring me down?'
